name: Bruce Aidell's Bourbon-Mustard Glaze
recipeInstructions:
Note: Use this glaze to marinate pork or beef ribs before grilling or broiling; paint on lamb or pork chops, duck breast, or ham before baking. Baste with the mixture several times during cooking.
1. In a small bowl, combine sugar, molasses, bourbon, soy sauce, and Worcestershire Sauce. With a whisk, mix the ingredients until the sugar has dissolved.
2. Add mustard and black pepper, then whisk until smooth.
